# NI Feature Inventory

Inventory of NMU / NSU features defined in `ni_function_blocks.json`. 
Per Invariant 1, the JSON does not drive codegen of internal unit classes; 
this file is documentation + a drift gate.

Column **Expected c_model header** points to the conventional path for that 
feature's c_model implementation. Existence is **not enforced** — most features 
won't have an implementation until Layer B / Stage 2.

## NMU — Network Master Unit

_Role_: AXI-side injection / response sink

| Feature ID | Summary | Modes | Expected c_model header |
|---|---|---|---|
| `FEAT-NMU-AXI_SLAVE_PORT` | AXI4 full-protocol slave port (AW/W/AR/B/R) with built-in async data boundary crossing between aclk_i and noc_clk_i. | Active, Passive | `c_model/include/nmu/axi_slave_port.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NMU-ADDR_TRANS` | Converts AXI awaddr/araddr to NoC dst_id + local_addr using XY-extraction, SourceRouting, or IDRouting (SAM table lookup). | XYRouting, SourceRouting, IDRouting | `c_model/include/nmu/addr_trans.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NMU-PACKETIZE` | Assembles AXI AW/W/AR transactions into NoC request flit streams (header + payload), tagging dst_id, src_id, awid/arid, last, and rob_idx. | — | `c_model/include/nmu/packetize.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NMU-VC_MAPPING` | Maps outbound flits to a VC at flit-construct time (design-time fixed policy; req-VC=0, rsp-VC=0 for NUM_VC=1). VC egress arbitration is in FEAT-NMU-VC_ARB. | — | `c_model/include/nmu/vc_mapping.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NMU-VC_ARB` | Round-robin arbitration across populated VCs at NMU REQ_OUT egress. Selects which VC's flit is emitted onto the NoC link each cycle, subject to per-VC credit availability. | RoundRobin | `c_model/include/nmu/vc_arb.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NMU-ROB` | Per-AXI-ID response reordering for the read path. Variants: NoRoB (pass-through), SimpleRoB (issue-order), NormalRoB (per-ID linked-list with prev_dest adaptive bypass). | NoRoB, SimpleRoB, NormalRoB | `c_model/include/nmu/rob.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NMU-DEPACKETIZE` | Parses inbound NoC response flit streams into AXI B/R beats (with last) before delivery to the AXI slave port. | — | `c_model/include/nmu/depacketize.hpp` |

## NSU — Network Slave Unit

_Role_: NoC-side reception / AXI-side master

| Feature ID | Summary | Modes | Expected c_model header |
|---|---|---|---|
| `FEAT-NSU-AXI_MASTER_PORT` | AXI4 full-protocol master port (AW/W/AR/B/R) with built-in async data boundary crossing between noc_clk_i and aclk_i. | Active, Passive | `c_model/include/nsu/axi_master_port.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NSU-DEPACKETIZE` | Parses inbound NoC request flit streams into AXI AW/W/AR transactions before delivery to the AXI master port. | — | `c_model/include/nsu/depacketize.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NSU-META_BUFFER` | Snapshots request flit metadata (rob_idx, src_id, awid/arid) on AW/AR flit reception; retrieved at response injection time to reconstruct the return path. | — | `c_model/include/nsu/meta_buffer.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NSU-PACKETIZE` | Assembles AXI B/R beats from the local slave into NoC response flit streams, using META_BUFFER for dst_id / rob_idx / bid\|rid return-path reconstruction. | — | `c_model/include/nsu/packetize.hpp` |
| `FEAT-NSU-VC_ARB` | Round-robin arbitration across populated VCs at NSU RSP_OUT egress. Selects which VC's response flit is emitted onto the NoC return link, subject to per-VC credit availability. | RoundRobin | `c_model/include/nsu/vc_arb.hpp` |
